Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Keanos]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Keanos is a huge white-furred dog bound in gold armor with bright blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Keanos is a female dog.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Keanos is a dog in Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Keanos is a hound with glowing gold armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Keanos is capable of tracking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Keanos has a scent he is following.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Keanos is a character who barks in competition with the city bells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Keanos led Alin to the house.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
